description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light panels, large glass windows, and multiple outdoor living spaces, including a covered patio and a balcony. The front of the house has a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, which is sheltered by an overhang. There is a garage integrated into the lower level, and a swimming pool is visible in the backyard, surrounded by fencing and landscaping. The house is enclosed by a perimeter fence, with greenery and trees providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a covered patio, balcony, garage, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, garage, covered patio, and a glimpse of the pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long expanse of windows, the flat roof, and the fenced perimeter with landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, balcony, large glass doors, and a tree providing shade and privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional outdoor spaces, the flat roof sections, and the integration of the house with the surrounding fence and greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a staircase, covered porch, overhang, and a modern door integrated with the facade.
